name: Special groups have been assigned to a new logon
definition: Windows Security Event ID 4964 records Special groups have been assigned to a new logon.
trigger_scenarios: Windows logs the event when the audited security operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: SpecialGroups containing a privileged SID such as RID -512 on a Type 10 logon identifies a domain-admin remote session; correlate the Logon ID to 4624.
The initiating account and Logon ID support attribution and correlation to 4624 and 4688.
The affected host determines the operational impact.

false_positives: Documented maintenance, policy changes, or approved administration can generate this event.
Validate change control and host role before suppressing.
detection_notes: SpecialGroups containing a privileged SID such as RID -512 on a Type 10 logon identifies a domain-admin remote session; correlate the Logon ID to 4624. This is a T1078 Valid Accounts signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the actor, process, and related events.
kql_snippet:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4964
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account
